name: CrateDB
description: Add and update data in CrateDB

fields.label: Query
fields.placeholder: SELECT id, name FROM product WHERE quantity > $1 AND price <= $2
fields.description: The SQL query to execute. You can use n8n expressions or $1 and $2 in conjunction with query parameters.

fields.label: Schema
fields.description: Name of the schema the table belongs to

fields.label: Table
fields.description: Name of the table in which to insert data to

fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the properties which should used as columns for the new rows

fields.label: Return Fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the fields that the operation will return

fields.label: Schema
fields.description: Name of the schema the table belongs to

fields.label: Table
fields.description: Name of the table in which to update data in

fields.label: Update Key
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the properties which decides which rows in the database should be updated. Normally that would be "id".

fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the properties which should used as columns for rows to update

fields.label: Return Fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the fields that the operation will return
